reason: Verify flutter test + flutter build web green; no analyze run.
Verify the module-level _ShellNavSignal is documented as deliberate (not slipped in), and that no view subscribes to it (it's a navigation-time signal only).
Verify the new transitions module is the only source of truth — no inline duplicate sharedAxisSlide bodies in app_router.dart.
Verify no shell-level AnimatedSwitcher / KeyedSubtree pattern reappears anywhere; the architectural constraint is permanent for this codebase.
Verify the visual contract is matched (±0.06 offset, AppMotion.nav, emphasized) so users don't perceive the rewrite as a regression.
